name_cn:
MINI DAUPHINE Handbag #️⃣M45959
Exclusive global launch! This style is custom-made according to Chanel boutique specifications with dynamic chip serial numbers. Original factory materials and original factory pale gold electroplated full steel hardware (color consistent with authentic).
Please compare with the authentic French version!
We ensure 100% authenticity. Original factory materials, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship + official website's latest full gift box.
20 x 15 x 9 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram and Monogram Reverse coated canvas
Calfskin trim
Microfiber lining
Hardware
Front magnetic closure
2 interior compartments
Back slip pocket
Strap: Removable, adjustable
Half-length: 26.0 cm
Adjustable up to: 49.0 cm
Made in France
